headline: Digital Realty Strengthens Portfolio With $7.8B Data Center Deal
summary: DLR is set to acquire Blackstone's stake in three Northern Virginia data centers, strengthening its hyperscale portfolio and supporting future Core FFO growth.

raw.headline: Digital Realty Strengthens Portfolio With $7.8B Data Center Deal
raw.summary: DLR is set to acquire Blackstone's stake in three Northern Virginia data centers, strengthening its hyperscale portfolio and supporting future Core FFO growth.

headline: Blackstone Sells $3.5 Billion Data-Center Stakes to Digital Realty
summary: Digital Realty will buy Blackstone interests in three Northern Virginia data centers using $1.2 billion cash and $2.3 billion stock.

raw.headline: Blackstone Sells $3.5 Billion Data-Center Stakes to Digital Realty
raw.summary: Digital Realty will buy Blackstone interests in three Northern Virginia data centers using $1.2 billion cash and $2.3 billion stock.

headline: Sell Alert: 2 REITs Getting Risky
summary: Some REIT risks remain underappreciated: gas stations & car washes face long-term headwinds, while leveraged farmland adds danger. Click here to read more.

headline: Digital Realty Prices Secondary Offering of Common Stock by Blackstone
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, June 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR), the largest global provider of cloud- and carrier-neutral data center, colocation and interconnection solutions, announced today the pricing of an underwritten registered public offering of 12,310,249 shares of its common stock by affiliates of Blackstone Inc. (collectively, “Blackstone”) at a public offering price of $185.00 per share. The shares of common stock being sold in this offering will be issued to Blackstone

headline: Alphabet: The Drawdown Is An Opportunity To Pounce
summary: Alphabet (GOOG) stock is upgraded to Strong Buy after a 15% drop. CapEx surge is de-risked by a record $90B equity raise. Read here for more details.
